title: Amelco's Modpack
description: Modpack designed for players of Amelco's modded server.
body:
# Amelco's Modpack

This modpack was designed for our server however you can effortlessly enjoy it on your own in singleplayer or on other servers!

Created for thrilling adventures and engaging multiplayer experiences, this modpack is ideal for playing with friends.

It features a variety of mods focused on magic, technology, armors/tools, and new mobs, utilizing all the latest additions from version 1.21.

### Recomended Requirements:
- CPU: 6x Cores modern CPU _(only for singleplayer or server host)_;
- RAM: 6GB+ dedicated to Minecraft;
- An SSD is highly recommended.


### Licensing and Credits
<details>
<summary>Included Resource Packs and Shaders</summary>
  
- [Complementary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound)
</details>
